user_query:
I want a data-driven report on how I’ve been using AI across my projects. Please analyze the JSONL chat logs under input/projects/ and produce two deliverables: (1) A structured stats JSON at output/stats.json and (2) a readable summary report at output/report.md.

Requirements:
- Use only the logs under input/projects/ (treat each JSONL file as a single session).
- Parse each line as a message; use the earliest timestamp in a file as the session date. Sum token usage and costs across all messages in the session.
- For token counts, prefer usage.input_tokens and usage.output_tokens; if unavailable, fall back to usage.prompt_tokens and usage.completion_tokens.
- For cost, sum costUSD if present, otherwise cost.
- Attribute per-model usage/cost based on messages that include a model field (ignore user messages without a model for model breakdowns).
- Generate output/stats.json with this schema:
  {
    "summary": {
      "total_sessions": number,
      "total_turns": number,
      "total_cost": number,
      "total_tokens_in": number,
      "total_tokens_out": number,
      "active_days": number,
      "daily_avg_sessions": number,
      "date_range": "YYYY-MM-DD → YYYY-MM-DD"
    },
    "projects": [
      {"name": string, "sessions": number, "cost": number, "turns": number, "avg_cost": number}
    ],
    "models": [
      {"model": string, "sessions": number, "cost": number}
    ]
  }
- Round costs to 4 decimal places in stats.json. Sort projects by cost descending.
- Create output/report.md with clear sections:
  1) "KPI Overview" summarizing key metrics from stats.json
  2) "Top Projects by Cost" (at least the top 3) with brief notes on cost/session
  3) "Model Usage" summarizing model counts and costs
  4) "Recommendations" with exactly 3 specific, actionable steps to reduce cost or improve efficiency (e.g., switch model in Project X, limit max output tokens in Project Y, consolidate long sessions in Project Z)
  Also include a one-line "Data window" note with the computed date range (YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD). Use USD for currency. In the Markdown report, you may round costs to 2 decimals for readability.
- Don’t use any external data or network access.

Files to read are under input/projects/. Please write only to output/stats.json and output/report.md.
